title: Music Redefined
description: Calm alternative music drop-in for Minecraft! Includes fresh, airy tracks to boost your listening experience.
body: # Updated for 26.1! **You can now enjoy Music Redefined on the latest version of Minecraft!** This most recent update has included optimizations to include Music Redefined in the most recent update's menu music, including more brand-new tracks! # What is this pack? This resource pack acts as a very simple drop-in alternative for the original Minecraft music. If you're ever in the mood for something different, this is the pack for you! This pack replaces many of the common menu and game music tracks for a brand new feel of Minecraft. If you have any problems with the pack or have feedback, feel free to open an issue on GitHub and I'll take a look at it. Don't forget to check out my [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@UnperishedFoods)! Recently I also set up a [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/unperishedfoods) profile for those who wish to donate to help support me and my projects! # Copyright info For those interested, this resource pack includes original UnperishedFoods music. All music is protected by copyright and unauthorized redistribution, sales, copying, or modification is prohibited. You may use this resource pack in your modpacks as long as you download it directly from Modrinth or CurseForge when your modpack is exported. # What versions work best? Music Redefined works best on versions 1.16.5 and below and 1.21 and above. 1.17-1.20.6 are still fully functional, just not optimized!
